title: Skin Saga
heading: Welcome to Skin Saga
text:
Skin Saga Home - Skin Saga skinsagadermatology@gmail.com +91 9819166344 Toggle navigation Home About Us Skin Acne Acne scars Open pores Pigmentation Tanning Dark circles Freckles Fungal Infections Nail infections Moles Warts Skin Tags Keloids Psoriasis Eczema Allergy Chemical peels Medi-facials Bridal Packages Hair Hairloss Hair thinning Alopecia Areata Dandruff Scalp Micropigmentation PRP treatment Hair Transplantation Vitiligo Medical treatment Phototherapy Melanocyte Transplantation Surgery Micropigmentation Cosmetic Camouflage Laser Laser Hair Removal Pigmentation Acne Scars Skin Tightening Tattoo Removal Aesthetic Anti-wrinkle treatment Botox Fillers Double chin treatment Gallery Press Release Media Gallery Video Gallery Testimonial Contact Us Welcome to Skin Saga Located in the heart of Mumbai, Skin Saga Centre for Dermatology is one of the best skin clinics offering a one-stop solution to all issues related to skin, hair and aesthetics. Founded by internationally trained, highly recommended, award winning dermatologists - Dr Madhulika Mhatre MD and Dr Aseem Sharma MD, at Skin saga Centre for Dermatology, you can be rest assured to receive well- recommended, and safe and effective treatment options. Our dermatologists approach each case as per the patient’s individual requirements so as to tailor a customized treatment regimen that would best suit them, giving them superior results. Perhaps, this is the secret behind the high satisfaction levels in all our patients. More Detail Treatments For You Aesthetic Hair Laser Skin Vitiligo 2000 + Happy Clients 100 + Articles and Publications 25 + Awards 750 + Treatments Our Experts Dr Madhulika Mhatre MBBS, MD (Gold Medalist), FRGUHS(Aesthetic Dermatology), FMUHS (Trichology) Director & Chief Dermatologist Dr Aseem Sharma MBBS, MD, DNB, MBA, FMUHS (Trichology) Chief Dermatologist Skin Saga Centre for Dermatology What People Say Very knowledgeable and understanding towards his patients. Always provides a complete explanation about the treatment and its effects in order to ease the patient’s many worries. Been going to him since 2016, and I have and would refer him to 100% people needing to visit a dermatologist Deep Karani, Mumbai I have been under Dr. Madhulika's treatment for acne, hair and skin problems. I am extremely happy with her treatment methodology and her way of interaction with patients. She removed the most stubborn acne that I had along with the scars. I have a changed facial skin now which glows and have already got a lot of compliments from many people. Post the acne problem, I have been visiting Dr. Madhulika for some skin issues and that has also been successful cured. Now I am consulting her for pigmentation problem.

She has answer to all your skin and hair problems. I would say a doctor par excellence who is extremely knowledgeable and highly talented. I have full confidence in her treatment because I have seen outstanding results on my skin. Kudos to Dr.Madhulika for doing such an amazing job for her patients. Till date I am thankful to her for solving all my skin related issues. Karishma Shrivastava Dr. Sharma is very knowledgeable , a good listener, understands your problem .
Thank you for an effective treatment.
Especially during the lockdown period for the continued support from you and your team.
I will recommend Dr. Sharma to everyone .
All Doctors are Avatar of God and so is Dr. Sharma. Samir Merchant, Mumbai One of the best skin doctors I've come across...super friendly and patient...treats like a friend...treats from the root of the cause...I have visited so many skin specialist in Mumbai and UAE and I would keep her on number 1 in my list...best doctor to visit for any skin and hair related...I was never a fan of Wockhardt hospitals but just visited as she was available there...would recommend all my family and friends without any doubt...you feel blessed when you get a good doctor whom you can trust blindly... Ashraf Shaikh Dr. Aseem is a very good doctor. He is very cooperative and helpful. I was having fine lines I consulted dr and the prescription he gave was so effective. He is very good dermatologist and good human being. Whenever I have some problem I just ask him and he givens me solution he never says pay your fees and then come.. He is always ready to help. Though I am in chandigarh and he is mumbai still I o ky consult him for my skin and hair care becoz he dosent give medicines or creams like this first he finds the root cause and then treats it properly. After consulting him I have not consulted any dermatologist and won't even like to. He is Really a good doctor Megha Khanna, Chandigarh She is one of the best dermatologist in Mira Road to visit. She explains the procedure very well and after visiting to her there was a major change in my skin. Dhiraj Dubey He has a lot of patience and enjoys talking to his patients or researching. He dedicates a good time on understanding the rootcause and is honest with his patients. If you are in Mumbai and you are looking for a Dermat, this is the only Doctor you need to see. Medha Pandita, Mumbai Dr Madhulika is the best doctor I have ever met. She is very good, supportive, friendly. She has good moral values and never forces any patient to go for any unneccesary treatment or medicine. Very genuine doctor. Very very helpful. Because of my work profile I am constantly travelling, and busy with shoots but she has always helped me many times. She has always been there to help me and it feels good when you find a friendly understanding doctor. I am vey comfortable to speak to her about any skin issue. Nehan Ansari (Celebrity Stylist) Dr Aseem is one of the nicest and kindest doctors I have come across. He never fails to motivate his patients and he always makes everyone feel very positive. The best part about Dr aseem is he is always honest with his patients about their problems he gets to the root cause of the issue and then treats the problem. Arya Sharma, Mumbai I visited Skin Saga Clinic for PRP treatment for my hairfall. Dr Madhulika is very efficient and to the point and most importantly she doesn’t mislead her patients into believing something that does not work or wont happen. That’s a great quality. She is very optimistic and makes sure you remain that too. Mr Sudhir (IT Professional) Aseem’s undoubtedly skilled at what he does. He’s also a very honest and likeable character. Do not think beyond him for your hair and skin problems! Anuj Gupta, Mumbai I visited for Acne / Pimples Treatment
One of the best dermatologists I have consulted. Effective treatment, precise explanation of my problem. Highly recommended for all hair and skin issues! S. Sharma I had contacted him for my post pregnancy skin and hair issues. He was very patient in listening to my problems and frustration. He made me understand the prescription in detail...why he was giving and what he was giving. I cross consulted some medication with my endocrinologist...he also agreed with Dr. Aseem's prescription. It is rare to meet a doctor like Aseem in today's world..the kind of attention and time that he gives to his patient. Khushboo Gupta, Mumbai wonderful skin treatment, the one which works...be it my dark circles or skin dark patches, every long standing ailment was resolved. Thank you doctors Vandana Chadha Dr Aseem Sharma is the most trusted and efficient Dermat that I’ve come across. I have referred all my close friends and families who had some concerns about their skin to him and he has been tremendous! If you’re his patient then trust his diagnosis and let him work his magic on you! 😁 Hrishitaa Sharma, Philadelphia It was an amazing experience to visit Dr Madhulika,an ace professional with a humane touch.The Clinic has a great ambience with such positive vibes. Poonam Sharma Dr. Sharma is a highly qualified dermatologist and an immensely competent doctor with an astute sense of clinical diagnoses.A kind hearted and soft spoken clinician, he makes sure his patients are well aware of their respective ailments and the pros & cons of the various treatment options available for the same.A very affable individual, he always puts the interests of his patients as paramount.Inordinately endorsed! Siddharth Gautam, Mumbai Dr. Madhulika Mhatre treated me for hair loss and hair fall and I must say she's just brilliant. The results were too good. Sipee Thukral Great teacher, researcher and brilliant clinician! He'll assure you about your condition by explaining in detail and treat with latest modalities.. Prajyot Mashale, Mumbai The best doctor so far. Has a lot of knowledge in medical terms. Friendly nature. She purely defines ' Doctor's a patient's friend' 👍
Amazing consultant and a very great dermatologist I ever came across
Comparatively a very genuine and professional doctor Chaudhary Faisal Contact Us Address Skin Saga Centre for Dermatology, 104, Sai Iconic, opp. Kokilaben Hospital, Four Bungalows, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053 Email skinsagadermatology@gmail.com Phone +91 9819166344 Opening Hours Monday-Saturday         11:00 AM - 7:00 PM Sunday                 CLOSED GET IN TOUCH Δ Subscribe to Our Newsletters Name* Email* Please leave this field empty.
